assertions.reason: The shared CI-style simulator path built for testing and launched both DawnLoopTests and DawnLoopUITests through test-without-building without deployment-target or test-bundle configuration errors; only documented unrelated legacy tests failed afterward.
Targeted planner tests passed for custom step-count retention on create/load plus preview endpoint preservation.
Dense-ramp planner tests passed for exact step count, preserved endpoints, and a strictly increasing redistributed brightness sequence.
Planner density-guardrail tests passed for duration-driven clamping and the preserved global 30-step cap.
Automation parity tests passed for dense-ramp brightness matching, endpoint preservation, and planner/automation step-count parity.

frictions.description: The repo's shared simulator command exercises the full suite, so validating VAL-PATH-001 requires separating milestone-targeted passes from known unrelated suite failures.
frictions.resolution: Captured both the targeted planner/automation run and the shared build-for-testing + test-without-building run, then attributed only non-milestone failures to the shared path result.

summary: Validated 5 assertions via simulator/Xcode flows: all 5 passed. The shared CI-style build-for-testing + test-without-building path launched both test bundles without deployment-target/test-bundle configuration errors, and the brightness-targeted planner/automation assertions also passed. Known unrelated legacy suite failures occurred only after both bundles launched and were treated as out of scope per mission guidance.
